description: Stable machine-consumed event types for audit event classification.

codes.summary: Records the opening of a local session and the schema bundle versions used by participating components.
Records a model-gateway outbound request with allowlist and destination attribution.
Records successful artifact ingestion after canonicalization and immutable metadata assignment.
Records deterministic denial of an artifact flow that is not allowed by the signed flow matrix.
Records excerpt promotion request, approval, denial, rate-limit, size-limit, or revocation actions.
Records per-role or per-step artifact quota violations including the rejected operation context.
Records retention, GC, export, and restore actions including reclaimed bytes when applicable.
